verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Almighty Savior You never fail You hold all power

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's never a challenge Or a need to worry We always win

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're great And there's no one like You You're true And none compare to You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Great And there's no one like You You're never ending Never ending Great

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Almighty Savior You never fail You hold all power

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's never a challenge Or a need to worry We always win

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Because You're great And there's no one like you You're true And none compare to You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Great And there's no one like You You're never ending Never ending

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: You're great And there's no one like You You're true And none compare to You

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Great And there's no one like You You're never ending Never ending

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: No sickness is stronger than You No power is greater than You No wisdom is wiser than You You're greater You're greater

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: No sickness is stronger than You No power is greater than You No wisdom is wiser than You You're greater You're greater

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Greater Greater Greater No one compares For you are

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: Stronger Stronger You're greater Greater

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: Our God is greater Our God is stronger God you are higher than any other

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: Our God is Healer Awesome in Power Our God Our God

verse.name: v17
verse.lines: Our God is greater Our God is stronger God you are higher than any other

verse.name: v18
verse.lines: Our God is Healer Awesome in Power Our God Our God

verse.name: v19
verse.lines: And if our God is for us Then who could ever stop us? And if our God is with us Then what can stand against?

verse.name: v20
verse.lines: And if our God is for us Then who could ever stop us? And if our God is with us Then what can stand against?

verse.name: v21
verse.lines: Then what can stand against?

verse.name: v22
verse.lines: No sickness is stronger than You No power is greater than You No wisdom is wiser than You You're greater You're greater

verse.name: v23
verse.lines: No sickness is stronger than You No power is greater than You No wisdom is wiser than You You're greater You're greater
